item.title: This just feels unreal now
item.description: Pete Souza published this photo titled "Rain and the Rose Garden”, with the caption, "When the skies opened up one fall afternoon, I saw the President reach out to feel the raindrops". The image of President Barack Obama standing on the Colonnade of the White House, looking out at the Rose Garden was captured on October 15, 2014, when a sudden rainstorm began.
item.dc:creator: CaptainBackPain

item.title: Unfit For Public Service
item.description: This is Los Angeles City Attorney Hydee Feldstein Soto. Three days before the 2nd No Kings Protest, she filed a motion to lift an injunction which disallows city police from using force on members of the press. She did this on the behalf of LAPD and without consulting Los Angeles City Council, then she ignored city council when they voted unanimously for the LA City Attorney's Office to withdraw the motion. Her request for reporters to be pepper sprayed, beaten, and zip-tied for doing their jobs was ultimately blocked by a judge a day before the protest was scheduled. Angelenos, when this unAmerican boot-licking sack of pig shit runs for city attorney again on June 2, 2026, vote her fascist ass out. https://laist.com/news/politics/judge-blocks-lapd-request-use-of-force-press-no-kings-protests?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_content=&utm_campaign=LAist&fbclid=IwVERDUANne0JleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABHtkMaMWBgBfvCLVR8BqAAm1O9x_apePMpd7XZn0FBqpRYhy1vbhJOL4IZNsN_aem_CjbD0RBBT4eYWvcT9zVLNQ
item.dc:creator: Tomcat1982

item.title: Is George Soros Really Evil?
item.description: I mean all Elon does is make fatherless children, steal other people’s ideas and watch dancing cupcakes in the sky that nobody else can see. Oh, and steal elections. Can’t forget that. Anyway, if you’ve latched on to the George Soros is the devil thing, you just might be antisemitic or just a little silly. But my guess is you never bothered to see why he was so evil.
item.dc:creator: slimvictor

item.title: This Canadian ad put Trump in a huge snit
item.description: The province of Ontario put together this ad and is spending $75 million to air it in Republican districts, as part of an effort to sway opinion against this idiotic trade war. In response, Trump has broken off trade talks and is exploring legal measures against the province. (And yes, that’s Ronald Reagan’s voice, from a speech he made on free trade)
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.131 HARD TO SPELL

COVER ARTIST: NICLAS M
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Hot Like Dimes - Pretty Lights YouTube: https://youtu.be/wgfyJ5P8SeY?si=sATZGESQyNgcg41v Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/1x8naNQ4vGiVKw6H9rs8ox?si=b84f5d73373e431f
Bluesssatan
Shawn Braley
Alexandre Chaudret
Pascal Blanche
Eccvi
Alexandre Chaudret
Liam Golden
Thomas Dubois
Pawel Kuczynski
Reza Afshar
Yuumei
Oliver Wetter
Beeple
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @hendawg2020 did this drawing of Chucky for spooky season!
27 Man Tax: Vincent Price
“Quiet please. I am analyzing.” - Robby the Robot, Forbidden Planet I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work and pretty destitute. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, you are the best. You've helped me so much. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
